response:
joke aside, the term refers to illegal trade.

This activity strikes at the heart of public safety.

Laws exist to protect the heart of our communities.

Smuggling involves moving substances across borders.

Distribution networks often operate in shadows.

Authorities work tirelessly to dismantle these rings.

Consequences for offenders are severe and lasting.

Society suffers when such crimes go unchecked.

Understanding this issue helps us fight it.
